overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing the Arasaka corporate complex in Night City. The camera slowly ascends over a futuristic hexagonal building surrounded by high-rise glass towers near a waterfront during the blue hour, revealing the expansive city skyline as cinematic title text appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate plaza with hexagonal central structure

agents.ego_description: drone camera ascending slowly from low aerial position, focusing on the illuminated Arasaka complex below

entered.detail: futuristic hexagonal central structure with glass roof panels and illuminated edges
tall angular glass and steel office wings surrounding the central plaza
industrial steam vents releasing white vapor on the left side of the complex
small patch of trees and greenery in the center of the hexagonal structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low aerial view of the Arasaka corporate complex, showcasing its distinctive hexagonal architecture with glass roof panels. Steam vents release atmospheric vapor on the sides while the central garden provides a touch of greenery. The drone slowly ascends, maintaining focus on the building as surrounding glass office wings frame the shot.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate district with waterfront and city skyline views

events.description: camera rises sufficiently to reveal waterfront harbor and distant Night City skyline in background

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent revealing the harbor and dense skyscraper skyline beyond the immediate complex

entered.detail: body of water with docks and industrial structures visible in the distance
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and towers forming the Night City skyline

segments.scene_description: As the drone continues its ascent, the perspective widens to reveal the waterfront harbor on the left and the dense Night City skyline rising in the background. The hexagonal building shrinks in the frame as more of the urban landscape becomes visible, transitioning from a focused architectural study to a sweeping city view.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial overview of Night City waterfront district

events.description: cinematic text 'Arasaka' appears in lower left corner of screen
text 'Cyberpunk 2077' appears below Arasaka logo completing the title card

agents.ego_description: final ascent showing expansive cityscape with cinematic title text overlay appearing on screen

segments.scene_description: The drone reaches its highest altitude, showing a sweeping overview of the Arasaka complex nestled within the greater Night City urban landscape. The central building appears small from this height while the waterfront and skyline dominate the background. Cinematic title text appears sequentially, first 'Arasaka' then 'Cyberpunk 2077', identifying the location and game source.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial ascent that transforms a detailed architectural study of a corporate complex into a sweeping panoramic view of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a low-angle perspective of the Arasaka complex, focusing on its hexagonal glass roof, central greenery, and the atmospheric vapor rising from side vents. As the drone climbs, the frame widens to reveal the surrounding glass office wings and the adjacent waterfront harbor, shifting the focus from the building to the dense urban sprawl. The perspective then expands further until the hexagonal structure shrinks within the vast Night City skyline, which dominates the background from a high altitude. Finally, the scene culminates in a wide overview of the corporate hub nestled in the city as cinematic title text for Arasaka and Cyberpunk 2077 appears sequentially across the screen.
